## Check type ID

`kind: object_field_type`

## Purpose

Require that a frontmatter field has a specific type.

## Configuration keys

| Field | Required | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|---|
| `field` | yes | - | Frontmatter key to check. |
| `type` | yes | - | One of `string`, `boolean`, `array`, `object`, `number`, `integer`. |

## Example

```yaml
collections:
  notes:
    path: notes
    checks:
      - kind: object_field_type
        field: year
        type: integer
```
